name: Abdullah Al Mahmud
title: PhD Student, Chemical and Biomolecular Engineering
bio:
I am a second-year Ph.D. student at the William G. Lowrie Department of Chemical and Biomolecular Engineering at The Ohio State University (OSU). I am currently working as a Graduate Research Associate in the Getman Fluid/Solid Interface Engineering Group under the supervision of Prof. Rachel B. Getman.
Previously, I was an MS student in the School of Chemical Engineering at Yeungnam University, South Korea. I worked as a research assistant in the Nano Energy Materials and Process Laboratory from March 2022 to March 2024. I worked on electrochemical water splitting and energy storage (supercapacitors).
Prior to joining YU, I obtained my BS in Chemical Engineering in 2021 under the Department of Chemical Engineering at the Bangladesh University of Engineering and Technology (BUET).
location: The Ohio State University, Columbus, OH 43210, USA
